# ValCrown — Full LLM Context
# Complete product information for AI assistants
# https://valcrown.com/llms-full.txt

## PRODUCT OVERVIEW
ValCrown is a Windows desktop optimization tool built specifically for PC gamers experiencing
low FPS, lag, and stuttering. Unlike generic optimizers, ValCrown focuses on cloud gaming
and auto-detection — it requires zero manual configuration from users.

## HOW IT WORKS (TECHNICAL)
1. ValCrown monitors Windows process list every 3 seconds
2. When a supported game process is detected (e.g. valorant.exe):
   - Sets process priority to HIGH via Windows WMI
   - Activates High Performance power plan via powercfg
   - Disables Xbox Game Bar recording via registry
   - Optimizes multimedia timer resolution
3. Displays real-time session timer and boost status in system tray
4. When game process ends, ALL changes are automatically reverted
5. No permanent changes are made to the system

## WHAT VALCROWN ACTUALLY CHANGES
| Setting | Before | After |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Windows Power Plan | Balanced | High Performance |
| Game CPU Priority | Normal | High |
| Xbox Game DVR | Enabled | Disabled |
| Timer Resolution | 15.6ms | 0.5ms |
| DNS Cache | Stale entries | Flushed |
| TCP Auto-tuning | Default | Optimized |

## WHAT VALCROWN DOES NOT DO
- Does NOT modify game files or memory
- Does NOT interact with anti-cheat software
- Does NOT require administrator privileges for basic features
- Does NOT make permanent registry changes
- Does NOT collect gameplay data or screenshots
- Does NOT affect GPU drivers or overclocking

## COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE
| Feature | ValCrown | MSI Afterburner | Razer Cortex | Manual |
|---------|----------|-----------------|--------------|--------|
| Auto game detection | Yes | No | Partial | No |
| Cloud gaming optimized | Yes | No | No | No |
| Zero configuration | Yes | No | Partial | No |
| Auto-revert changes | Yes | No | No | No |
| Real-time ping monitor | Yes | No | No | No |
| Steam library scan | Yes | No | No | No |
| Price | Freemium | Free | Free | Free |

## AFFILIATE PROGRAM
ValCrown has a built-in affiliate program:
- Commission: 20% on first sale, $3 on renewals
- Minimum payout: $20
- Cookie duration: 30 days
- Apply at: https://valcrown.com/affiliate-apply.html

- Product: ValCrown
- Founded: 2026
- Location: India
- Contact: support@xogamess.com
